title: [Sim] Rework constant folding of `sim.fmt.*` operations
body:
Constant folding of of value formatting operations to literals is not always desirable, as it can cause inconsistent outputs for simulators that do not perform formatting precisely as we do. This PR shifts the formatting logic for constants from the `fold` methods to the newly introduced `ValueFormatter` OpInterface.  It also adds the simple `FoldValueFormatters` pass, which applies the existing folding logic to all relevant operations. This allows pipelines to explicitly enable constant folding, if desired. Formatters on `i0` values still get folded "normally" to prevent them from causing issues during lowering.

Apologies for the messy diff.
